title: Create: The Gearlands
description: Create: The Gearlands is a modpack that contains what feels like every create mod.
body: Hello, I created this modpack for my YouTube project. It contains many of the Create mods. For example, the Create Hypertube mod, which allows you to travel very quickly. It also includes new fluids like oil, which allows for a new way to produce su. It also includes a few non-Create mods that enhance the gameplay experience.
